description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style trolley with a rectangular, enclosed body and four large, rugged wheels designed for stability and mobility on urban surfaces. The exterior is primarily dark gray with a yellow accent stripe running horizontally along the upper edge. Both sides feature a prominent bear graphic, adding a distinctive visual element, and there are multiple access panels and vents, suggesting internal compartments or machinery. The front end has a reinforced towing hitch and a vented grille, while the rear is flat with a handle for manual maneuvering. The surface appears to be made of metal, likely steel, with some plastic or rubber components for the wheels and trim. Branding and labeling are visible on the sides and front, indicating a professional, possibly commercial or municipal use.
description: A heavy-duty, enclosed gray trolley with four large wheels, yellow accents, and bear graphics on the sides. Features include a towing hitch, multiple access panels, and visible branding.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a flat surface with a central handle and visible branding, flanked by two large wheels.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the bear graphic, two large wheels, access panels, and a yellow accent stripe.
description_view_2: The front view displays a vented grille, towing hitch, and prominent branding, with the wheels partially visible.
description_view_3: The right side view features a bear graphic, access panels, a vent, and the yellow accent stripe, mirroring the left side.
attribute_handle_type: single bar handle, rectangular, metal, located at the rear for manual maneuvering
attribute_wheel_arrangement: four wheels, two on each side in parallel configuration
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding visible on the front and rear panels, with a logo and text; bear graphic on both sides
